Package com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp

Class GeminiClientImp

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool.BaseClass
      • com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec.AbstractGeminiClient
        • com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp.GeminiClientImp
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    GeminiClient
    public class GeminiClientImp
extends AbstractGeminiClient
    Implementation of the GeminiClient interface.
    Since:
    0.0.1
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Constructor Detail

      • GeminiClientImp

        public GeminiClientImp​(String apiKey,
                       String model,
                       HttpClient httpClient,
                       String baseUrl,
                       JsonService jsonService)
        Constructs a new AbstractGeminiClient with the required API key, model, HTTP client, base URL, and JSON service.
        Parameters:
        apiKey - The API key for authentication with the Gemini API.
        model - The default model to use for requests.
        httpClient - The HTTP client to use for communication.
        baseUrl - The base URL for the Gemini API.
        jsonService - The JSON service to use for serialization and deserialization.
